bot-polish-v2.title: Bot polish v2 — Slop-only, model upgrade to Sonnet 4.6, source linking
bot-polish-v2.notes: Complete. Sig removed, Slop on Sonnet 4.6, source linking enforced, all docs updated.

tasks.text: Part 0: Remove Sig bot — client, slash commands, message handling
Part 1: Update Slop model from kimi-k2 to claude-sonnet-4-6
Part 2: Add source links to context assembly + system prompt
Part 3: Update docs — bots.md, user-facing /docs, guides, .env.example

setup-handover.title: Setup & handover — get bot and webhooks live in the LS Discord server
setup-handover.notes: No code. Owner does 3 tasks (invite bot, create webhooks, test channel), then Brad tests and switches to live.

tasks.text: Owner: Invite Slop bot to LS server
Owner: Create announcement webhook, send URL
Owner: Create yap webhook, send URL
Owner: Create #slop-testing channel + webhook
Brad: Test webhook post in #slop-testing
Brad: Test @Slop mention in #slop-testing
Brad: Test full ingestion pipeline
Brad: Switch to live channels + redeploy
Brad: Delete test channel, confirm first real ingestion

member-nodes.title: Member nodes — community members as first-class nodes in the knowledge graph
member-nodes.notes: Adds 'member' node type, /join slash command, member-aware interactions (lookup before response, update after response), compounding knowledge per user. Changes span both latent-space-hub (type + category) and latent-space-bots (slash command + member lifecycle).

tasks.text: Part 1: Add member NodeType, MemberMetadata, and category to latent-space-hub
Part 2: Add lookupMember() and createMemberNode() functions to latent-space-bots
Part 3: Add /join slash command + handler to latent-space-bots
Part 4: Modify handleMessage — member lookup + system prompt injection
Part 5: Add updateMemberAfterInteraction() — notes, metadata, edges
Part 6: Update slop.soul.md with member awareness section
Part 7: End-to-end test — /join, chat, verify node + edges in graph

visual-pizazz.title: Visual pizazz — ASCII art header, Latent Space purple accent, terminal flair
visual-pizazz.notes: Complete. ASCII header, purple brand accent, box-drawing dividers, tree-style previews, terminal loading states. Build + type-check pass.

graph-bot-polish.title: Graph & bot final polish — companion linking, entity extraction fix, Slop-first bot strategy, dashboard type breakdown
graph-bot-polish.notes: Code complete. Manual follow-ups: run companion backfill script, run entity extraction backfill, reclassify node 4050, implement Slop persona in latent-space-bots repo.
